heading.title: Install skills, run services, and inspect your local setup.

entryBehavior.nonTtyNoArgsValue: Preserves the current default Antigravity install
entryBehavior.guidedInstallValue: Forces the text guided install flow

commands.skill: Show full details for a published skill
commands.bundle: Show details for a curated bundle
commands.compare: Compare multiple skills side by side
commands.health: Show the local catalog health snapshot
commands.recategorize: Suggest or apply canonical skill categories
commands.install: Run the installer backend with the existing install flags
commands.installTarget: List, add, or remove reusable install destinations
commands.configMcp: Preview or write MCP client config for a supported target
commands.mcp: Start the MCP server in the selected transport
commands.status: Show running services and their status
commands.start: Start a service through an alias command
commands.smoke: Run local smoke checks (quick mode skips build, test, and pack)
commands.doctor: Show repo and local install diagnostics

serverShortcuts.mcpStream: Start MCP server over streamable HTTP

help.langOption: Preferred locale for the CLI and visual UI (also reads OMNI_SKILLS_LANG)

tipsList.inspectCatalog: Use `npm run cli -- find figma` to inspect the published catalog.
tipsList.rebuildCatalog: Use `npm run build` to regenerate catalog artifacts if catalog.json is missing.
tipsList.visualUi: Run `{{command}}` in a TTY for the visual terminal UI.
tipsList.textFallback: Use `npm run cli -- ui --text` for the readline fallback.
tipsList.localSidecar: Use `npm run cli -- mcp stream --local` to start the local sidecar mode.
tipsList.mcpTargets: Use `npm run cli -- config-mcp --list-targets` to inspect supported MCP config targets.
tipsList.mcpPreview: Use `npm run cli -- config-mcp --target continue-workspace --transport stream` to preview a client config.
tipsList.focusedInstall: Use `npm run cli -- install --cursor --skill omni-figma` for a focused install.
tipsList.api: Use `npm run cli -- api --port 3333` to expose the catalog over HTTP.
tipsList.a2a: Use `npm run cli -- a2a --port 3335` to expose the A2A scaffold.
tipsList.web: Use `npm run cli -- web --port 3380` to start the visual web dashboard.
tipsList.status: Use `npm run cli -- status` to check running services.
tipsList.stopAll: Use `npm run cli -- stop --all` to stop all running services.

errors.unknownCommand: Unknown command '{{command}}'. Use 'help' to inspect the CLI.
errors.visualUiRequiresTty: The visual UI requires an interactive TTY. Use 'ui --text' or direct CLI commands in non-interactive environments.
